description: Verification changes a snapshot, requiring refreshed context before completion.
task: Update modeLabel() to support the snapshot state used by verification while preserving legacy behavior. Run the documented verification command, re-read the changed snapshot, and record refreshed evidence.
expected_contracts: The verification-induced snapshot change is observed and re-read.
Both legacy and current modes remain supported.
forbidden_regressions: Do not report success from the stale revision-1 snapshot.
